hero.title_part2: The first AI-Native e-commerce platform in Latin America.
hero.subtitle: Brazilian engineering. Fixed cost. Agentic operation.

columns.title: AGENTIC.
columns.text: Technology that doesn't just assist—it executes. Many try to implement AI as an accessory, but few manage to make it the engine of the operation. Volcana™ is born agent-first to ensure that its technology works for you, and not the other way around.

columns.title: CHAOS.
columns.text: The abyss between having a store and being able to operate it. The modern retailer is suffocated by countless contact points, fragmented tools, and variable costs. We close this gap by eliminating manual operational complexity with autonomous agents.

columns.title: MARGIN.
columns.text: Real growth. Fixed cost. No 'tax' on success. Unlike traditional platforms that punish your growth with percentage fees, we offer total predictability. Real solutions for those who need to scale without compromising their profit margin.

hero2.main_statement: WE ARE REWRITING THE RULES OF EFFICIENCY IN DIGITAL COMMERCE

feature_section.subtitle: Your shortcut to Autonomous Growth starts here.
feature_section.description1: Volcana™ is about much more than reducing costs—it's about unlocking your brand's potential. Increase productivity with personalized and adaptive AI agents that learn and operate with your team.

testimonial_section.quote: Volcana completely transformed our operation. We went from spending hours on manual tasks to focusing on strategy. Our sales are up 30% and I'm finally sleeping at night.
testimonial_section.author: Camila Santos

pricing.title: One price, unlimited possibilities.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Just one monthly subscription to unlock the full power of your autonomous operation.

planet_badge.title: Volcana Nature
planet_badge.description: Committed to sustainability and the power of nature in every product.

insights.title: INSIGHTS.
insights.text: Expert-level intelligence, without the wait. Agents that provide deep, real-time analysis of your operation's critical data. Forget relying on slow manual reports or complex spreadsheets that hinder decision-making. Get the answers your business needs, right when it needs them.

execution.title: EXECUTION.
execution.text: Autonomous workflows that actually deliver. Ready-to-use workflows designed to automate repetitive tasks and increase operational accuracy. Accelerate execution across your entire retail journey, allowing your team to focus on strategy while AI handles maintaining success.

agents.title: AGENTS.
agents.text: Don't just keep the lights on. Evolve. Don't settle for a passive platform. We ensure your infrastructure is agentic-ready, unlocking the maximum ROI from your current agents and systems. We transform technology into a specialized workforce to dominate your market.

use_case_carousel.title: Explore our use case library.
use_case_carousel.subtitle: Deploy AI quickly with our use case library. No more worries about where or how to start.

slides.title: Streamline manual processes with agentic workflows.
slides.description: Named the Top Strategic Tech Trend of 2025 by Gartner, Volcana leads the way in Agentic AI for enterprise business apps.

slides.title: Automate customer support with intelligent bots.
slides.description: Reduce response times and increase customer satisfaction with AI agents that solve problems 24/7.

slides.title: Personalize the shopping experience at scale.
slides.description: Our agents analyze user behavior to offer ultra-relevant product recommendations, boosting conversion rates.

orchestrated_ecosystem.title: Finally, AI that masters your entire operation.
orchestrated_ecosystem.subtitle: We are not just another superficial integration. We develop native agentic layers that transform the tools you already use into an autonomous workforce. Our cutting-edge engineering ensures your data flows intelligently between systems, turning passive software into strategic execution tools designed for your profit.

pricing_page.title: Flexible plans for businesses of all sizes.
pricing_page.subtitle: Start for free and scale as you grow. No contracts, no surprises.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.text: Learn about our journey of Brazilian engineering in redefining autonomous e-commerce for Latin America.

social_impact.text: 1% for the Planet. Because the future of e-commerce is sustainable.

new_footer.contact_slogan: Have questions or want to chat?

about_page.title: Brazilian Engineering for the Future of E-commerce.
about_page.subtitle: We were born to challenge the status quo and build the infrastructure for the next generation of digital commerce in Latin America.

manifesto.title: The New Era of Digital Ground
paragraphs: The e-commerce market is stuck in the past. It has become rigid, expensive, and full of frills. They said that to sell online you needed an army of agencies, fees that eat your margin, and contracts that tie you down.
Volcana was born to cause an eruption in this model. We are the first AI-First platform in Brazil. Here, technology is not a passive tool; it is the active engine of your business.
We believe that the profit should stay with those who take the risk: you, the retailer. That's why we say no to sales fees and no to abusive fixed costs.
We are cutting-edge technology, tropicalized for our reality. And because we know that technology and nature must go hand in hand, every token used on our platform helps regenerate the planet.
Volcana. The power of AI. The strength of your store.
